title: The Disappearance from Room 347

scenes.text: A hotel room left untouched, and a guest who vanished.
It happened in New Orleans, at the Hotel Monteleone.
In 2005, a man named Eric McFadden disappeared without a trace during his stay.
The Hotel Monteleone continues to host guests, some unaware of its mysteries.
Despite extensive searches, Eric remains missing and his case unsolved.
scenes.label: MISSING SINCE 2005

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 New Orleans, USA - 2005. A guest at the Hotel Monteleone disappears without a trace, leaving behind an untouched room. Follow for daily cold cases!
